2114550.name: Exhale XR - Magical Woodlands
2114550.description:
Enhance your experience within the Exhale XR app with this VR immersion from the Exhale wellness library.

Experience Details
In this seasonal mix of atmospheres you will find a place for solace. Listen to the peaceful sounds of spring as the creek slowly flows by. From there this immersion will take you to a morning side fire pit on a vibrantly colorful fall day in the mountains. And finally transcending a top a mountain to watch as the sunrises and the fog clears from the valley below.

Purpose
Relaxation
Self Meditation

Length
12:04

Specs
360° video
3840x2160
29.97fps
.mp4 file type
2114550.supported_languages:

*具有完全音频支持的语言
